_comment: Tailscale Serve declarative config. Loaded by tailscaled at boot when TS_SERVE_CONFIG is set. ${TS_CERT_DOMAIN} is auto-substituted to the sidecar's tailnet hostname (e.g. slate-controller.taild2bce8.ts.net), so this file is portable across deployments — no env interpolation required outside Tailscale. NOTE: the proxy target URL must include the path prefix to preserve, otherwise Tailscale strips the matched handler prefix before forwarding (e.g. `/api/auth/me` becomes `/auth/me` if the target is just `http://...:8000`).
